svg.title: Booklet assembly instructions
svg.desc: Step-by-step visual guide showing how to cut, stack, nest, fold, and staple printed sheets into a saddle-stitch booklet
svg.text: Each sheet has a 2×2 grid of pages
You now have two half-sheets per printed sheet
Step 3: nest inner inside outer, fold
Inner signature sits inside outer; fold all in half together
Front cover = page 1, back cover = page 16
